meta.source_acs_tenure: data/hna/summary/*.json DP04_0046E owner-occupied and DP04_0047E renter-occupied
meta.method: Population-share apportionment: weight = min(1, place_pop × share_of_place_area / tract_pop). Falls back to area-share (share_of_tract_area) when population data is missing. F28 fix — area-share alone under-counted small towns in large rural tracts ~70×. Post-step: renter and owner household LEVELS are independently anchored to each place's cached ACS DP04_0047E/DP04_0046E occupied-tenure counts when available, preserving within-tenure CHAS AMI distributions and cost-burden rates (see tenure_anchor per place). Profiles missing usable tenure fields keep the legacy ACS occupied cap as fallback.
